info.title: AI Passport Registry API
info.description: API for managing AI agent passports, policy enforcement, and verification. Generated from JSDoc @swagger comments.

get.summary: Get agent passport Agent Passport page
get.description: Retrieve public information about an agent passport for display on Agent Passport pages
Retrieve all available assurance levels with metadata

post.description: Validate assurance level and method combinations

get.description: Returns the last N audit hashes for a tenant to enable tampering detection
Get details of a specific API key (without the actual key)

post.description: Create a new API key for a user or organization

get.description: Retrieve system performance metrics and statistics (admin only)
Returns the complete OpenAPI 3.0 specification in JSON format

post.description: Creates a new organization record in the system

put.description: Changes the status of an existing passport (suspend, activate, revoke) with comprehensive validation, Verifiable Attestation, and admin support. Triggers webhooks and cache invalidation.

agent_id.description: The agent passport ID (must match path parameter)

owner_id.description: The owner ID of the passport

force_change.description: Force status change even if validation fails (admin only)

notify_owner.description: Whether to notify the passport owner of the status change

webhook_data.description: Additional data to include in webhook notifications

put.description: Updates an existing agent passport with comprehensive validation, Verifiable Attestation, and admin support. Supports partial updates and admin overrides.

role.description: Updated functional role of the agent

description.description: Updated description of the agent's purpose and capabilities
description.example: Enhanced AI-powered customer support agent with advanced capabilities

capabilities.description: Updated list of agent capabilities with optional parameters

refund_amount_max_per_tx.description: Maximum refund amount per transaction (USD cents)

regions.description: Updated geographic regions where the agent can operate

contact.description: Updated contact information for the agent owner

model_info.description: Updated AI model information and capabilities

model_refs.description: AI models used by the agent

force_update.description: Force update even if validation fails (admin only)

notify_owner.description: Whether to notify the passport owner of the update

webhook_data.description: Additional data to include in webhook notifications

get.summary: List instances of a template passport
get.description: Get a paginated list of all instances created from a template

post.summary: Create an instance of a template passport
post.description: Creates a new instance passport based on an existing template
Register a webhook endpoint for a specific agent/passport

items.description: List of events to subscribe to

post.description: Creates a new agent passport (template or instance) with comprehensive validation, Verifiable Attestation, and admin support. Supports both regular user creation and admin-created passports.

description.description: Detailed description of the agent's purpose and capabilities
description.example: AI-powered customer support agent for handling common inquiries

capabilities.description: List of agent capabilities with optional parameters

refund_amount_max_per_tx.description: Maximum refund amount per transaction (USD cents)

regions.description: Geographic regions where the agent can operate

contact.description: Contact information for the agent owner

model_refs.description: AI models used by the agent

force_create.description: Force creation even if validation fails (admin only)

get.summary: Get a policy pack by name and version
get.description: Retrieves a specific policy pack configuration
Returns current system status including SLO metrics and health
Retrieve controlled enums for categories and frameworks with display metadata

get.summary: Get badge data for specific categories and frameworks
get.description: Generate badge display data for AgentCard components

post.description: Creates a new tenant with region selection support for multi-region and multi-tenant architecture.

region.description: Region where tenant data will be stored

get.description: Hot path verification with KV-only reads, multi-region/multi-tenant support, and comprehensive performance monitoring. Returns passport data with caching and high availability.
Public endpoint to verify attestations cryptographically without requiring authentication. Provides cryptographic verification of attestations and their Verifiable Attestation chain.

get.summary: Verify policy decisions for an agent
get.description: Comprehensive verification of policy decisions with Merkle tree, chain integrity, and cross-reference validation

post.description: Hot path policy verification with KV-only reads, multi-region/multi-tenant support, TenantDO integration for refunds, and comprehensive performance monitoring. Evaluates policy decisions based on agent capabilities and context.

agent_id.description: The agent ID to verify against

idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key for duplicate request prevention

passport_data.description: Optional passport data for offline verification

post.description: Generate a new secret for the webhook
Send a test ping to the webhook endpoint

get.description: Get details of a specific webhook

post.description: Register a webhook endpoint for receiving notifications

target.description: The type of entity this webhook is for

target_id.description: The ID of the target entity

agent_id.description: Optional agent ID for agent-level overrides

items.description: List of events to subscribe to

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the AI agent
